message:
🐛 Fix kubectlProxy blocking agent in dev mode with demo token (#2121)

kubectlProxy.ensureConnected() checked getDemoMode() which returns
true when the auth token is "demo-token" (default in dev mode), even
if the user explicitly toggled demo mode off. This prevented ALL
kubectl commands from executing through the WebSocket, breaking
compliance hooks and other cluster data fetching.

Replace getDemoMode() with isNetlifyDeployment — the check only
needs to prevent WebSocket attempts on Netlify where no local agent
exists. In local dev mode, the agent may be running and should be
allowed to connect regardless of token type.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
